subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen sendeth greetings to the people of Bahá and declareth that which hath befallen you in the path of love for the Lord of Names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اهل بها را تکبیر میرساند و میفرماید آنچه بر شما در سبیل محبت مالک اسماء
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
